entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[DQC.US.0114.9563] Business Combination, Recognized Identifiable Assets Acquired, Goodwill, and Liabilities Assumed, Net with a value of 14,290,504 is not equal to the combined total of Assets and Liabilities acquired excluding Goodwill and Goodwill ( -4,091,441 + 10,199,063 ) with a value of 6,107,622.
These values should be equal. The properties of this us-gaap:BusinessCombinationRecognizedIdentifiableAssetsAcquiredGoodwillAndLiabilitiesAssumedNet fact are: Period :2022-11-14 Dimensions : us-gaap:BusinessAcquisitionAxis=dolphinentertainment.com:SocialyteLLcMember Unit : USD Decimals of Net Value Acquired : 0 Decimals of Net Assets and Net Liabilities : 0 Decimals of Goodwill : 0
